text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Nikkei Shinshun Hai, Meisho Doto's first race
goal of her very own, is today. It's also the first
race of her senior year.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, no, no... Wh-wh-wh-wh-what sh-should I
dooo?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I've never felt this much pressure... making your
own goals really changes things.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I don't know if I can do this... But I'm the reason
I'm here.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No, no, nooo. Try to calm down, Doto... Oh
nooo... Oh nooo...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ack, you're right! I shouldn't just fan the flames of
anxiety.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I have to do this. I have to. Opera O
is expecting me in her spring G1.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto comes back to her senses. Her
mental fortitude has really improved.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wow, wow, wow... You two can certainly hold
your ground. And the way you encouraged Doto
just now, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't be any more pathetic... I'm supposed to
have more experience, but I haven't offered a
single thing.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The least I can do is make my cheering today
extra supportive! Do your best, Doto! May all
your wishes come true!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Carrying many high expectations, Meisho Doto
enters the stage of today's graded race.
